overview: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women (SVECW), located in Bhimavaram, Andhra Pradesh, is a premier autonomous women’s engineering institution known for academic excellence, strong placements, modern infrastructure, and industry-oriented technical education. The college consistently attracts top recruiters from product-based and multinational companies.
accreditation: NAAC A+ Grade (Cycle 2) with CGPA 3.32/4.0; Autonomous Institution.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Convener Quota (Category A): ₹70,000 – ₹1,05,000 per year (Approx. ₹4.20 Lakhs total). Management Quota (Category B): ₹2,00,000 – ₹3,00,000+ per year depending on branch.

placements.medianSalary: UG 4-Year: ₹4.50 LPA – ₹6.00 LPA; PG 2-Year: ₹4.20 LPA – ₹4.25 LPA
placements.totalOffers: 1,400+ overall placements; 1,156+ offers in recent session
placements.companiesVisited: Adobe, Intuit, Amazon, Flipkart, Cloudera, Walmart, VISA, Optum, DE Shaw
placements.internationalOffers: Limited international opportunities through multinational product companies

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions for B.Tech are primarily through AP EAPCET counseling under Convener Quota and through Management Quota for eligible candidates. PG admissions are based on GATE/AP PGECET scores.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules follow AP EAPCET, AP PGECET, and Andhra Pradesh state counseling timelines.

campus.area: Modern residential campus in Bhimavaram, Andhra Pradesh
campus.specialNote: Hostel fees range between ₹90,000 – ₹1,18,000 per year including mess charges. One-time admission/caution deposit ranges from ₹5,000 – ₹10,000.

scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) Full Tuition Reimbursement
Merit Scholarships for Top EAPCET/JEE Rankers
Financial Assistance for Economically Weaker Students

contact.address: Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women, Vishnupur, Bhimavaram, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh, India
